JORDAN 1 MOCHA 😎

Is this the most hyped Jordan 1 high ever? I guess it is. And if not, well I just had to add it to my collection. This colorway fits every outfit in my opinion. 

This pair is from Mr. Hou, probably one of the best Jordan 1 sellers out there. 

Look at the suede, it is so alive. No brush needed. Gorgeous. Swoosh placement is perfect. Jordan logo is perfect. Nike swoosh looks perfect. Midsole maybe a little bit to much yellow but for me it’s perfect. 😁

This one is the LJR batch. I guess it’s still the best Jordan 1 batch out there. Next LJR pair could be Obsidians or should I go for something else? 

Rock with confidence guys!
